entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used in the study to assess the effects of the d2 dwarfing gene.

entities.name: D2 GENE
entities.description: A dwarfing gene in pearl millet studied for its effect on seedling and culm length.

entities.name: COLEOPTILE LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the coleoptile in pearl millet seedlings.

entities.name: MESOCOTYL LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the mesocotyl in pearl millet seedlings.

entities.name: PLUMULE LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the plumule in pearl millet seedlings.

entities.name: CULM LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the culm in pearl millet plants.

entities.name: ISOGENIC INBRED LINES
entities.description: Pairs of tall and dwarf inbred lines used for genetic comparison.

entities.name: ISOGENIC HYBRIDS
entities.description: Pairs of tall and dwarf hybrids used for genetic comparison.

entities.name: FIELD TRIALS
entities.description: Replicated trials conducted over two seasons to measure culm length.

entities.name: DARK INCUBATION AT 35C
entities.description: Environmental conditions in incubators used for germinating seedlings to measure coleoptile and mesocotyl lengths.

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: A group of grass crops used for comparison of dwarfing gene effects.
